title: Peppery Flaky Lamb Stir-fry
description: This savory and aromatic dish is a perfect solo dinner option featuring tender lamb mince with hints of pepper for added flavor without the use of sugar.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat a bit of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb mince and cook until browned on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add green onions, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, and tomato paste. Stir well to combine.
Return the cooked lamb mince back into the skillet with the sauce mixture. Add dill if using, and stir until everything is evenly coated and heated through.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
